message:
test(e2e): add doom-style helper module loading test for package manifests

Validates that extensions using inline __dirname declarations in helper
modules load correctly through the package manifest pipeline without
the CJS-to-ESM rewriter clobbering user-declared bindings. Exercises
PackageManager::resolve_extension_sources end-to-end with a doom1.wad
finder pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
